summary: The DNS sync tree divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in SyncAction returns and an unchanged-state early return; no sync state-machine behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 129: M	crates/net/dns/src/sync.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to SyncAction returns and an unchanged-state `return`.
No Pending/Enr/Link/Active/RootUpdate transition, unresolved link/node ordering, root update timeout, or sync state assignment changed.
